artifacts.summary: Rewrote docs/installation.md as a macOS-only, skippable detect/install/verify guide and repaired the one broken inbound link in docs/agent-system/zed-agent-panel.md.

completion_data.completion_summary: Revised docs/installation.md to be macOS-only: removed all NixOS content, added Xcode CLT and Node.js sections, and normalized every dependency section (Homebrew, Node, Zed, Claude Code, MCP tools) to a uniform detect/install/verify template so users can skip anything already installed. Corrected the outdated `brew install anthropics/claude/claude-code` command to `brew install --cask claude-code` and replaced `claude auth login` with the current first-run `claude` flow. Repaired the broken `#platform-notes` inbound link in docs/agent-system/zed-agent-panel.md.

summary: Task 7 complete: docs/installation.md rewritten for macOS with detect/install/verify template across 8 dependency sections; broken inbound link in zed-agent-panel.md repaired; all 6 phases committed individually.
